title: myroxylon balsamum
intro: Myroxylon balsamum, also known as the Indian frankincense or East Indian sandalwood, is a species of tree native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its resinous sap. The health benefits of Myroxylon balsamum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used topically or ingested under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
